name: list_collections
description: List all the collection IDs underneath a document.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of results to return.

pageToken.description: A page token. Must be a value from ListCollectionIdsResponse.

parent.description: Required. The parent document. In the format: `projects/{project_id}/databases/{database_id}/documents/{document_path}`. For example: `projects/my-project/databases/my-database/documents/chatrooms/my-chatroom` Use `projects/{project_id}/databases/{database_id}/documents` to list top-level collections.

readTime.description: Reads documents as they were at the given time. This must be a microsecond precision timestamp within the past one hour, or if Point-in-Time Recovery is enabled, can additionally be a whole minute timestamp within the past 7 days.
